mapper.select: SELECT SIMP_C,AMN_HDNG_EXPL3, trim(TO_CHAR(AMN_HDNG_EXPL3, '999,999,999,999,999')) as amt_comma FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE SIMP_TPC ='EPRO_WRS_NO' AND DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY to_number(AMN_HDNG_EXPL3)
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(RQR_NO))+1,1) from TB_PR_DM_PNT
INSERT INTO TB_PR_DM_PNT (RQR_NO, CORP_NO, USER_ID, RQR_CHRRNM, DCZ_AM, RQR_CHRR_EMAIL, RQR_CHRR_MPNO, PCH_DS, PAY_GBN, BANK_CD, VR_AC_NO_SEQ, EPRO_WRS_NO, PNT_AM, TR_DTM, ATTC_C, TID_CODE, BRC, MNBANK_ID, FSRGDTM, FSRGID, LSCHGDTM, LSCHGID) VALUES ( LPAD(#{inSeq}, 20, '0'), #{CORP_NO}, #{ses.userId}, #{buyerName} , TO_NUMBER(#{amt}), #{buyerEmail} , #{buyerTel} , (SELECT SIMP_C FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE SIMP_TPC = 'PCH_DS' AND AMN_HDNG_EXPL6 = #{payMethod}), '1', #{fnCd}, #{vbankNum}, #{goodsName}, TO_NUMBER(#{amt})/11*10, SYSDATE, #{authCode}, #{tid}, '000000', #{mid}, SYSDATE, #{ses.userId}, SYSDATE, #{ses.userId} )
INSERT INTO TB_PR_DM_TPAY (USER_ID, DCZ_AM, MOID, BUYER_NAME, MERCHANT_KEY) VALUES (#{ses.userId}, #{total}, #{moid}, #{buyerName}, #{merchantKey})
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CO_CORP SET PPAY_BAC = NVL(PPAY_BAC, 0) + (#{amt}/11*10) WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO}
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RQR_NO) AS RN_NO, TO_CHAR(TR_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') TR_DT, NVL(EPRO_WRS_NO, '') WRS_NO, NVL(RQR_CHRRNM, '') RQR_CHRRNM, (SELECT SIMP_CNM FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE SIMP_TPC = 'PCH_DS' AND SIMP_C = PCH_DS) PCH_DS, PNT_AM, DCZ_AM FROM TB_PR_DM_PNT WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND TO_CHAR(TR_DTM, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN #{DATE_FROM} AND #{DATE_TO} ORDER BY RQR_NO DESC
SELECT '(' || SUBSTR(CORP_NO,0,3) || '-' || SUBSTR(CORP_NO,4,2) || '-' || SUBSTR(CORP_NO,6,5) || ')' CORP_NUM, PPAY_BAC AMOUNT FROM TB_CO_CORP WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PR_DM_PNT_REFUND_BRK ( RFDM_REQ_DT, RQ_RGMN, RFDM_PNT, RFDM_DS, BNKNM, ACNO, DPRNM, CORP_NO, BRC, RFDM_SQNO, FSRGDTM, FSRGID, LSCHGDTM, LSCHGID, RFDM_OBJAM) VALUES (TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{RQ_RGMN} , #{RFDM_PNT} , 'I', (SELECT SIMP_CNM FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE SIMP_TPC = 'BANK_CD' AND SIMP_C = #{BANK_CD}), #{ACNO} , #{DPRNM} , #{CORP_NO}, '000000', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PR_DM_PNT_REFUND_BRK WHERE RFDM_REQ_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')), SYSDATE, #{ses.userId}, SYSDATE, #{ses.userId}, #{AMOUNT})
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RFDM_REQ_DT) AS RN_NO, NVL(RFDM_REQ_DT, '') RFDM_REQ_DT, NVL(DPRNM, '') DPRNM, NVL(BNKNM, '') BNKNM, NVL(ACNO, '') ACNO, ACTL_RFDM_AM, NVL((SELECT SIMP_CNM FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE SIMP_TPC = 'RFDM_DS' AND SIMP_C = RFDM_DS), '') RFDM_DS, NVL(RFDM_DT, '') RFDM_DT FROM TB_PR_DM_PNT_REFUND_BRK WHERE CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND RFDM_REQ_DT BETWEEN #{DATE_FROM} AND #{DATE_TO} ORDER BY RFDM_REQ_DT DESC, RFDM_SQNO DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TR_DTM) AS RN_NO , tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , use_cmt AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , SUM(pnt_in - pnt_out) OVER (ORDER BY tr_dtm, ROWNUM) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT /* 이전잔액 */ '00000000000000' AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , '이전잔액' AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , SUM(A.pnt_in) AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , 0 AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , SUM(A.pnt_in) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT /* 충전내역 */ NVL(A.pnt_am, 0) AS pnt_in FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT A /* 마감정산_이용권거래원장 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.pay_gbn = '1' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.tr_dtm < TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT /* 구매대체 */ NVL(A.s_ch_amt, 0) AS pnt_in FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_MOVE_BRK A /* 마감정산_포인트이동내역 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.s_sys_dsc = 'PR' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.lschgdtm < TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT /* 사용대체 */ NVL(A.t_de_amt, 0) * -1 AS pnt_in FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_MOVE_BRK A /* 마감정산_포인트이동내역 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.t_sys_dsc = 'PR' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.lschgdtm < TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
UNION ALL
SELECT NVL(A.cost, 0) * -1 AS pnt_in FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_UG_BRK A /* 마감정산_이용권 사용내역 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.del_yn = '0' AND A.adj_meth_dsc = '01' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.use_dt < #{ST_DT}
UNION ALL
SELECT NVL(A.rfdm_pnt, 0) * -1 AS pnt_in FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_REFUND_BRK A /* 마감정산_이용권환불신청내역 */ , (SELECT simp_c AS simp_c /* 단순코드 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 단순코드명 */ FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE 1 = 1 AND simp_tpc = 'REFUND_GBN' AND simp_c IN ('Y', 'I') ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.fsrgdtm < TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.rfdm_ds = B.simp_c ) A
UNION ALL
SELECT tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 구입유형 */ , pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , 0 AS bac , adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 구입유형 */ , pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT /* 구매 */ TO_CHAR(A.tr_dtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , A.simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT A.tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , B.simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 구입유형 */ , NVL(A.pnt_am, 0) AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , 0 AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , NVL(A.pnt_am, 0) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT A /* 마감정산_이용권거래원장 */ , (SELECT simp_c AS simp_c /* 단순코드 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 단순코드명 */ FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE 1 = 1 AND simp_tpc = 'PCH_DS' ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.tr_dtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.pch_ds = B.simp_c
UNION ALL
SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , '구매대체' AS simp_cnm /* 구입유형 */ , NVL(A.s_ch_amt, 0) AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , 0 AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , NVL(A.s_ch_amt, 0) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_MOVE_BRK A /* 마감정산_포인트이동내역 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.s_sys_dsc = 'PR' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.lschgdtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) A
UNION ALL
SELECT /* 사용_선불 */ TO_CHAR(A.tr_dtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , A.use_cmt AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , B.simp_cnm AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , 0 AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.cost AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_UG_BRK A /* 마감정산_이용권 사용내역 */ , (SELECT simp_c AS simp_c /* 단순코드 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 단순코드명 */ FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE 1 = 1 AND simp_tpc = 'EPRO_FEE_DSC' ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.del_yn = '0' AND A.adj_meth_dsc = '01' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.use_dt BETWEEN #{ST_DT} AND #{ED_DT} AND A.epro_fee_dsc = B.simp_c
UNION ALL
SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , '사용대체' AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , 0 AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.t_de_amt AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_MOVE_BRK A /* 마감정산_포인트이동내역 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.t_sys_dsc = 'PR' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.lschgdtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) A
UNION ALL
SELECT /* 환불 */ TO_CHAR(A.tr_dtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , A.use_cmt AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , B.simp_cnm AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , 0 AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , NVL(A.rfdm_pnt, 0) AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_REFUND_BRK A /* 마감정산_이용권환불신청내역 */ , (SELECT simp_c AS simp_c /* 단순코드 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 단순코드명 */ FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE 1 = 1 AND simp_tpc = 'REFUND_GBN' AND simp_c IN ('Y', 'I') ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.fsrgdtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.rfdm_ds = B.simp_c ) A ) ) )

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TR_DTM) AS RN_NO , A.tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , A.use_cmt AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , SUM(A.bac) OVER (ORDER BY ROWNUM) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT A.tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , A.simp_cnm AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , A.bac AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT A.tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , B.simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 구입유형 */ , NVL(A.pnt_am, 0) AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , 0 AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , NVL(A.pnt_am, 0) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT A /* 마감정산_이용권거래원장 */ , (SELECT simp_c AS simp_c /* 단순코드 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 단순코드명 */ FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE 1 = 1 AND simp_tpc = 'PCH_DS' ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.tr_dtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.pch_ds = B.simp_c
UNION ALL
SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 구매일자 */ , '구매대체' AS simp_cnm /* 구입유형 */ , NVL(A.s_ch_amt, 0) AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , 0 AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , NVL(A.s_ch_amt, 0) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_MOVE_BRK A /* 마감정산_포인트이동내역 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.s_sys_dsc = 'PR' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.lschgdtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) A ORDER BY A.tr_dtm ) A

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TR_DTM) AS RN_NO , A.tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , A.use_cmt AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , SUM(A.pnt_in - A.pnt_out) OVER (ORDER BY ROWNUM) AS bac , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT /* 선불 */ A.tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , A.use_cmt AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , B.simp_cnm AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , 0 AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.cost AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_UG_BRK A /* 마감정산_이용권 사용내역 */ , (SELECT simp_c AS simp_c /* 단순코드 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 단순코드명 */ FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE 1 = 1 AND simp_tpc = 'EPRO_RATE_DSC' ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.del_yn = '0' AND A.adj_meth_dsc = '01' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.use_dt BETWEEN #{ST_DT} AND #{ED_DT} AND A.epro_rate_dsc = B.simp_c
UNION ALL
SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , '사용대체' AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , 0 AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.t_de_amt AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_MOVE_BRK A /* 마감정산_포인트이동내역 */ WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.t_sys_dsc = 'PR' AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.lschgdtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) A ORDER BY A.tr_dtm ) A

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TR_DTM) AS RN_NO , A.tr_dtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , A.use_cmt AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , A.pnt_in AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , A.pnt_out AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , SUM(A.pnt_in - A.pnt_out) OVER (ORDER BY ROWNUM) AS bac /* 잔여(누적)이용권 */ , A.adj_meth_dsc AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM (SELECT A.fsrgdtm AS tr_dtm /* 사용일자 */ , B.simp_cnm AS use_cmt /* 구입유형 */ , 0 AS pnt_in /* 구매(취소)이용권 */ , NVL(A.rfdm_pnt, 0) AS pnt_out /* 사용이용권 */ , '01' AS adj_meth_dsc /* 선후불구분 */ FROM NHEPRO.TB_PR_DM_PNT_REFUND_BRK A /* 마감정산_이용권환불신청내역 */ , (SELECT simp_c AS simp_c /* 단순코드 */ , simp_cnm AS simp_cnm /* 단순코드명 */ FROM NHEBILL.TB_EB_CD_COMM WHERE 1 = 1 AND simp_tpc = 'REFUND_GBN' AND simp_c IN ('Y', 'I') ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CORP_NO = #{CORP_NO} AND A.fsrgdtm BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{ST_DT} || '000000', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{ED_DT} || '235959', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.rfdm_ds = B.simp_c ORDER BY A.fsrgdtm ) A

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY RQS_YM DESC) AS RN_NUM, ROWNUM AS NO, SUBSTR(RQS_YM, 0, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(RQS_YM, 5, 2) RQS_YM, NHEBILL.GET_SIMP_CNM('ADJ_METH_DSC',ADJ_METH_DSC) ADJ_METH_DSC, NHEBILL.GET_SIMP_CNM('RQS_DS',RQS_DS) RQS_DS, RQS_AM, TXA, TT_AM, LEV_AM, (TT_AM - LEV_AM) AS NON_PAY, RQS_BRC, RQS_CORP_NO, SUBSTR(RQS_CORP_NO, 0, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(RQS_CORP_NO, 4, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(RQS_CORP_NO, 6, 5) RQS_CORP_NM, NHEBILL.GET_SIMP_CNM('NC_COMP_DS_C',B.NC_COMP_DS_C) NC_COMP_DS_C, B.corp_nm CONM, NHEBILL.GET_AC_NO(A.VR_AC_NO_SEQ) AC_NO, RQS_NO FROM TB_PR_DM_MONTH_CHRG_ACC A , TB_CO_CORP B , TB_CO_BRC C WHERE A.RQS_YM BETWEEN #{ST_DT} AND #{ED_DT} AND A.ADJ_YN = 'Y' AND A.RQS_CORP_NO = B.CORP_NO (+) AND A.RQS_CORP_NO = C.CORP_NO (+) AND A.RQS_BRC = C.BRC (+) AND ( #{RQS_BRC} IS NULL OR A.RQS_BRC = #{RQS_BRC})
ORDER BY A.RQS_YM DESC
